content:
Never Miss a Call During Peak Summer Takeout and Delivery Rushes

3 min read
Just now

--

Ready to try Aldelo Express? Click here to get started today!
Summer is one of the busiest seasons for takeout and delivery. Between backyard barbecues, pool parties, holiday weekends, and sports watch parties, restaurants often experience a surge in phone orders that can overwhelm employees during peak hours.
If customers can’t get through quickly, they may call a competitor instead. That’s why AI-powered phone ordering has become an increasingly valuable tool for restaurants looking to increase revenue while maintaining excellent customer service.
What Is an AI Voice Ordering System?
An AI voice ordering system automatically answers incoming phone calls, takes customer orders, answers common questions, confirms order details, and sends orders directly to your POS system.
Unlike voicemail or basic phone menus, AI voice agents conduct natural conversations, helping customers place accurate delivery or takeout orders without waiting on hold.
With Aldelo Express Cloud POS, a seamless Aldelo AI Voice Agent helps restaurants capture more orders while reducing the workload on employees during busy service periods.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

A seamless Aldelo AI Voice Agent helps restaurants capture more orders while reducing the workload on employees during busy service periodsWhy Do Restaurants Receive More Phone Orders During Summer?
Summer gatherings often generate larger and more customized orders than typical weekday meals. Customers frequently call restaurants to:

• Order party platters or family meals

• Customize large orders

• Coordinate pickup or delivery times

• Ask questions about menu items

• Confirm catering-style requests
During lunch and dinner rushes, employees may not have time to answer every call while serving dine-in guests. Every missed call represents potential lost revenue.
An AI Voice Agent ensures every caller receives immediate assistance, even when your staff is fully occupied.
How AI Voice Ordering Helps Restaurants Increase Revenue
AI voice ordering helps restaurants convert more incoming calls into completed orders by eliminating long hold times and missed opportunities.
Key benefits include:

• 24/7 automated phone answering

• Faster order processing

• Improved order accuracy

• Consistent upselling opportunities

• Reduced employee workload

• Better customer satisfaction
Because the AI follows consistent ordering workflows, it can also recommend additional items during every call, helping increase average ticket values.
For example, the system can suggest:

• Appetizers

• Beverage bundles

• Desserts

• Family meal upgrades

• Limited-time summer specials
Unlike manual upselling, every customer receives the same opportunity to enhance their order.
Why AI Voice Ordering Works for Summer Events
Restaurants can capture more delivery and takeout revenue during:

• Sports watch parties

• Pool parties

• Backyard gatherings

• Holiday weekends

• Community festivals

• Family celebrations
Instead of hearing a busy signal or waiting on hold, customers immediately begin placing their orders, improving both the guest experience and order completion rates.

Instead of hearing a busy signal or waiting on hold, customers immediately begin placing their orders, improving both the guest experience and order completion ratesWhy Choose Aldelo Express AI Voice Ordering?
Restaurants need technology that supports employees rather than replacing them. Aldelo Express combines AI Voice Ordering with powerful restaurant management tools to help operators handle seasonal demand efficiently.
Additional Aldelo Express solutions include:

• Online ordering

• QR code ordering

• Delivery management

• Loyalty rewards

• Digital gift cards

• Real-time reporting

• Mobile payment solutions
Together, these features create a seamless ordering experience that helps restaurants serve more customers while maintaining speed, accuracy, and consistency during their busiest seasons.
Frequently Asked Questions
How does AI voice ordering help restaurants?
AI voice ordering automatically answers phone calls, takes customer orders, reduces missed calls, improves order accuracy, and helps restaurants capture more revenue during busy periods.
Can AI voice ordering increase restaurant sales?
Yes. By answering every call, reducing abandoned orders, and consistently suggesting add-on items, AI voice ordering can increase completed orders and average ticket sizes.
What types of restaurants benefit from AI voice ordering?
Quick-service restaurants, pizzerias, bars, casual dining restaurants, food trucks, and multi-location restaurant groups can all benefit from automated phone ordering.
Whether you’re preparing for summer watch parties, neighborhood pool gatherings, or holiday weekends, AI Voice Ordering helps ensure every customer call becomes an opportunity to grow your business.
